A Global Education Destination

Clear guidance for students choosing Nepal with confidence.

Compare universities, understand admissions, and move into a consultation path that feels calm, direct, and easy to trust.

Universities•Colleges•Courses•Admissions

Focused pathway

A cleaner route for international students who need clarity before they apply.

Universities, colleges, and admissions support in one calm, well-structured place.

Why Study in Nepal

A cleaner path for students who want clarity, not clutter.

Nepal can offer affordability, accessible campuses, and serious academic options. The layout below keeps that story focused and easy to scan.

Read study infoInstitutional Inquiry

Affordable and strategic

Nepal offers a practical balance of tuition, living cost, and academic access for international students.

Real-world campus culture

Students often find smaller, more personal campuses where support feels direct and human.

Career-minded pathways

Programs in business, hospitality, IT, and health can connect to employability and long-term plans.

01

Find the right level

Compare undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma, and language-focused pathways for your academic profile.

02

Explore institutions

Review trusted universities and colleges with practical information for international applications.

03

Plan your future

Map studies to careers, internships, and long-term migration-friendly opportunities.

Featured universities

A shortlist that feels curated, not crowded.

Dhulikhel

Kathmandu University

Recognized for strong academic planning, research culture, and a premium campus experience.

Get details

Kathmandu

Tribhuvan University

Broad program coverage with a long academic footprint and wide student familiarity.

Get details

Pokhara

Pokhara University

A practical choice for students looking for modern programs and an accessible city setting.

Nepal's Academic Infrastructure

Core objectives

Social Objectives

Student voices

Real stories, presented with the same care as the guidance.

Amina Rahman 🇧🇩

Kathmandu University

“The guidance was clear, calm, and more useful than the generic advice I had seen elsewhere.”

Rohan Patel 🇮🇳

Tribhuvan University

“The portal helped me compare options quickly and understand what mattered for my application.”

Pokhara University

“I liked the practical approach. It felt designed for decision-making, not just browsing.”
